findings.issue: Blocking bcrypt.hashSync() will tank throughput under load
findings.reasoning: You're holding up the entire process for a CPU-bound operation. This is the kind of thing that kills production apps at 3am.

findings.issue: process.env reads on every request are fine
findings.recommendation: Don't prematurely optimize -- process.env is fast enough
findings.reasoning: Premature optimization is the root of all evil. process.env reads are negligible.

findings.issue: No rate limiting on authentication endpoint
findings.recommendation: Add rate limiting middleware before auth routes
findings.reasoning: Someone will brute-force this. It's not if, it's when.
